summary: Authentication role-collision bug fix VERIFIED - All 4 test cases passed. Reseller and Sales Partner sessions now correctly isolated with separate token storage (reseller_token vs partner_token) and proper role validation on login.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix properly uses separate localStorage keys: reseller_token for resellers, partner_token for sales partners
Role validation in AuthContext.jsx (lines 104-132 for resellerLogin, lines 136-164 for partnerLogin) correctly prevents cross-portal login
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication role-collision bug has been FIXED and VERIFIED. All 4 test cases passed: (1) Reseller login + refresh session persistence, (2) Sales Partner login + refresh session persistence, (3) Cross-portal rejection - Sales Partner on Reseller portal shows error, (4) Cross-portal rejection - Reseller on Sales Partner portal shows error. Token storage properly isolated: reseller_token vs partner_token.

test_case_1_reseller_login.description: Login as reseller (trump@suitsindia.com), refresh page, verify session persists in Reseller portal

details.token_storage: SUCCESS - reseller_token SET, partner_token NOT SET

test_case_2_sales_partner_login.description: Login as sales partner (donald@suitsindia.com), refresh page, verify session persists in Sales Partner portal

details.token_storage: SUCCESS - partner_token SET, reseller_token NOT SET

test_case_3_cross_portal_rejection_sp_on.description: Attempt to login as Sales Partner (donald@suitsindia.com) on Reseller login page - should fail

details.login_rejected: SUCCESS - user NOT redirected to dashboard
details.error_message: SUCCESS - 'Please use the Sales Partner portal to login'

test_case_4_cross_portal_rejection_resel.description: Attempt to login as Reseller (trump@suitsindia.com) on Sales Partner login page - should fail

details.login_rejected: SUCCESS - user NOT redirected to dashboard
details.error_message: SUCCESS - 'Please use the Reseller portal to login'

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Authentication role-collision bug where Reseller and Sales Partner sessions were conflicting, causing users to be redirected to wrong portals after page refresh
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Frontend updated to use separate token storage (reseller_token vs partner_token) and separate login functions (resellerLogin vs partnerLogin) with role validation
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: FULLY VERIFIED - All 4 test cases passed
